seoTitle: How to Recall an Email in Freshdesk
metaDescription: Learn how to recall or undo a reply you sent in Freshdesk before it reaches your customer's inbox.
intro: Everyone has sent a reply with a typo or the wrong attachment. This guide covers how to recall an email reply in Freshdesk shortly after sending it, so you can catch mistakes before customers see them.

steps.heading: Locate the sent reply
steps.body: Open the ticket where you just sent the reply you want to recall.

steps.heading: Use the undo or recall option
steps.body: Look for an undo send option, which is typically available for a short window right after sending.

steps.heading: Act quickly
steps.body: Recall windows are time-limited, so you need to act within the seconds or minutes Freshdesk allows before the email is delivered.

steps.heading: Edit and resend if needed
steps.body: Once recalled, correct the reply and send it again with the fix applied.

faq.question: Can I recall any email sent through Freshdesk?
faq.answer: Recall typically only works within a short time window immediately after sending, not for older messages.

faq.question: What happens if the recall window has passed?
faq.answer: If the window has closed, the email has already been delivered and cannot be pulled back.

faq.question: Does recalling an email delete it for the customer too?
faq.answer: If the recall succeeds within the allowed window, the customer should not receive the original message.

faq.question: Is undo send available on all Freshdesk plans?
faq.answer: Feature availability can vary by plan, so check your specific Freshdesk plan for undo send support.
